---
name: Documentation Update
about: Suggest improvements or report issues in documentation
title: '[DOC] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Brief description of the documentation update request.

## Environment
* Related Engine: [k6 / JMeter / LoadRunner / custom / none]
* Affected Document: [e.g., README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, api-spec.md]

## Proposed Changes / Steps to Reproduce
* If reporting an error: what are the steps that led to the documentation discrepancy?
* If suggesting updates: what changes should be made to the target document?

## Expected Behavior
The correct information or structure that should be documented.

## Actual Behavior
The current outdated or incorrect documented information.

## Additional Context
Add links to references, specs, or standards here.
